text: Code reviews are a crucial part of software development. In a code review, a developer checks a colleague's work before it is added to the main project. This helps catch bugs early, when they are much easier and cheaper to fix. Beyond finding errors, reviews are an excellent tool for knowledge sharing. Team members learn different coding styles and techniques from each other. This process builds a stronger, more consistent team, raising the overall quality of the code everyone produces. Ultimately, code reviews create a culture of collaboration and continuous improvement.
